federation.membershipTodo: Agentic infrastructure (not an app, no federation membership of its own — it is agent-access glue). An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that exposes a Solid pod to MCP clients (Claude Desktop, etc.). It maps pod URLs 1:1 to MCP Resources and offers four pod-scope-guarded Tools — solid_list, solid_read, solid_search, solid_write — over an injectable authenticated Solid-OIDC/DPoP fetch (the server holds no bespoke crypto). Read-only by default; writes are opt-in (readOnly:false). M1 = stdio transport. The pod-scope guard is the SSRF/scope boundary that stops an agent reaching arbitrary origins. Typed data uses the suite's RDF shapes so an agent reads the same shapes the suite apps write.
